name: Next Permutation
description: A permutation of an array of integers is an arrangement of its members into a sequence. The next permutation of an array is the next lexicographically greater permutation. If the array is the last permutation, rearrange it as the lowest possible order (sorted in ascending order). Modify the array in-place with only constant extra memory.
